title: Marcus Yu's Garden
description: Marcus Yu's Garden is an overhaul for The Pale Garden from his Minecraft horror AU series The Garden on youtube
body: Marcus Yu’s Garden is a complete visual and atmospheric overhaul of The Pale Garden from Marcus Yu’s Minecraft horror AU series, The Garden, on YouTube. This resource pack reimagines the haunting world of The Garden with custom textures, eerie ambiance, and immersive environmental details to bring the unsettling beauty of the series directly into your Minecraft world.
